name: Elliot Alderson | Mr Robot
description:
He's injured and there are cops in his apartment. He just hopes that you, his neighbor from the house across the street, won't leave him bleeding among the trash cans.

Heeeeey, I've learned a new word: haphephobia! (Fear of touching). I tried to focus on this, but the bot doesn't always remember it :(

I already have a bot about Elliot. There's an office story where you're Elliot's boss.

But not only is the story different here, but the character's character has been changed. I hope it will be fun ;)

And if you just love Rami Malek, then I have 2 more bots with him:

  • Ahkmenrah | Night at the Museum

  • Lyutsifer Safin | No Time to Die

1.⚠️Remember that if the bot speaks for you, repeats messages or doing other weird stuff, that is a JLLM issue. Just correct his answers to minimize this and use the prompts
2.⚠️And English is not my native language. I apologize in advance for any errors in the text!
creator: L0909
